name: BreakFast Cooking Game
description: Breakfast Cooking Game is a fun and exciting cooking game where you can prepare delicious breakfast meals in your own virtual kitchen. In this game, you become a chef and cook tasty breakfast items step by step. Follow simple instructions, use kitchen tools, and serve fresh meals to your customers. This cooking game is easy to play and perfect for players of all ages. With smooth controls and colorful graphics, the game offers an enjoyable cooking experience. As you progress, you unlock new breakfast recipes and face new cooking challenges that make the gameplay more interesting and addictive.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
